case_title: CONNIE YOUNG, VS. AGI PUBLISHING, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, CONNIE DBA CONNIE HAIR SALON AS TO DEFENDANT AGI PUBLISHING, INC. DBA VALLEY YELLOW PAGES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF'S SISTER, EVA DUONG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-07-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AGI PUBLISHING, INC. DBA VALLEY YELLOW PAGES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AGI PUBLISHING, INC. DBA VALLEY YELLOW PAGES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2009 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY YOUNG, CONNIE DBA CONNIE HAIR SALON AS TO DEFENDANT AGI PUBLISHING, INC. DBA VALLEY YELLOW PAGES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, CONNIE DBA CONNIE HAIR SALON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AGI PUBLISHING, INC. DBA VALLEY YELLOW PAGES PLAINTIFF HAS PAID FOR ADVERTISING IN THE YELLOW PAGES COMMENCING MARCH 1, 2009. PLAINTIFF NOW WISHES TO CANCEL THE CONTRACT. THE CONTRACT STATES THAT CANCELLATION IS PER TERMS "ON THE REVERSE SIDE." THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS CANCELLED THE CONTRACT EFFECTIVE JUNE 3, 2009 AND OWES NO ADDITIONAL AMOUNTS UNDER THE ADVERTISING CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HI FILED BY YOUNG, CONNIE DBA CONNIE HAIR SALON AGI PUBLISHING, INC. DBA VALLEY YELLOW PAGES
